response.original_title: セクシーパブ　乳揉み尻さすり
response.overview: Makoto is a newcomer to a sexy pub. From her first day, she actively provides excellent service to customers, even going so far as to offer hotel services to customers who repeatedly request her, and quickly becomes the most popular hostess. Her seniors, Emi and Akane, warn her about her excessive behavior, but Makoto doesn't listen. A welcome party is held for her, but only the manager, Kanda, and the older hostess, Katsuko, attend. That night, Makoto and Kanda have sex at a hotel...
response.title: セクシーパブ　乳揉み尻さすり
